Curriculum Vitae

Eman Safavi Bayat

Interdisciplinary Researcher & Creative Technologist

Berlin, Germany

emansafavi.com

contact@emansafavi.com

Summary

Interdisciplinary researcher, creative technologist, and artist working across sound, creative coding, interactive media, and research through design. My practice connects audio, generative systems, prototyping, and experimental media in both artistic and academic contexts.

Education

M.A. Design & Computation

Universität der Künste Berlin / Technische Universität Berlin

B.Sc. Chemical Engineering

Azad University of Science & Research, Tehran

Academic Experience

Student Research Assistant

New Practice, TU/UdK Berlin

  • Coordinating technical infrastructure for research and artistic projects (audio, DMX, VR, 3D printing)
  • Contributing to research proposals and project documentation
  • Managing workflows for workshops and collaborative environments

Student Research Assistant

Wearable Computing, UdK Berlin

  • Developing interactive systems using textiles, sensors, and embedded technologies
  • Supporting experimental research setups and workflows
  • Contributing to toolkits and workshop formats

Student Research Assistant

InKüLe Project, UdK Berlin

  • Developing prototyping systems and research toolkits
  • Structuring and documenting interdisciplinary research processes

Professional Experience

Freelance Audio Engineer / Musician

  • Music and audio production, mixing, mastering, and podcast editing
  • Teaching guitar, sound synthesis, and music production
  • Audio work for performance, film, and creative media

Research & Projects

Watermarking Training Data for Generative Audio Models

Master thesis on generative audio models, watermarking, and AI-based audio analysis

Mythologizer

AI-based research tool using agent-based systems for narrative reconstruction

Hybrid Rituals

Interactive performance combining motion tracking, sound synthesis, and AI

Personal Sound Space

Immersive sound installation exploring spatial perception

Workshops / Installations / Performance

  • Flash Spiegel - Droste-Museum, Münster
  • Sound/Thesis - Modular Sound Synthesis Workshop (VCV Rack)
  • Hybrid Rituals - performance with motion tracking and AI
  • AirDrum - TouchDesigner workshop, UdK Berlin

Exhibitions

  • ARS Electronica
  • LNDW - TU Berlin

Skills

Programming & Systems

Python, C++, Linux, Raspberry Pi, server setup

Creative Coding

TouchDesigner, SuperCollider, Max/MSP

AI & Media Systems

Machine learning workflows, generative models, interactive systems

Audio

Reaper, Ableton Live, VCV Rack, sound design, mixing, spatial audio

Hardware & Prototyping

Arduino, sensors, DMX, 3D printing

Design & Media

Adobe Creative Suite, video production, Blender, Figma

Soft Skills

Research through design, interdisciplinary workshops, rapid prototyping

Languages
